AgentInfo.description: Identity of the probe build that produced the bundle (for replay + provenance).

dcgm_version.description: DCGM library version observed, if used.
dcgm_version.title: Dcgm Version

AgentInfo.title: AgentInfo

Attestation.description:
NVIDIA attestation result for this scan.

The verdict is whatever the chain evaluation actually returned; the outcome
semantics (UNVERIFIED, FALLBACK, and so on) live on
:class:`~evidence_schema.enums.AttestationVerdict`.

challenge.description: Operator-issued challenge nonce for this scan, recorded so a third party can recompute the freshness comparison against the raw report's nonce. None means no challenge was issued (pre-1.2.0 flow).
challenge.title: Challenge

detail.description: Human-readable note on the attestation outcome.
detail.title: Detail

freshness.description: Challenge-nonce freshness of the report. PASS: the report's nonce matches the operator-issued challenge. FAIL: mismatch (replay indication, disqualifying). NOT_ASSESSED: no challenge was issued; freshness rests on the measured_at window only, at lower confidence.

nras_used.description: Whether NRAS (remote attestation service) was used.
nras_used.title: Nras Used

report_b64.description: Verbatim attestation report (opaque, base64). Replay substrate.
report_b64.title: Report B64

root_reachability.description: Whether the NVIDIA root/PKI was reachable; False means the verdict cannot be VERIFIED online.
root_reachability.title: Root Reachability

verdict.description: Real verdict of the attestation chain evaluation.

Attestation.title: Attestation

AttestationVerdict.description:
Result of the NVIDIA attestation chain verification.

The verdict records what the chain evaluation actually returned; there is no
default-to-verified path. ``UNVERIFIED`` means the chain could not be
evaluated (e.g. PKI unreachable); ``FALLBACK`` means a secondary,
lower-confidence scheme was used and is marked as such.
AttestationVerdict.title: AttestationVerdict

DeterministicGates.description:
Certificate block 1: deterministic pass/fail gates, no model.

Authenticity and firmware failures are **disqualifying** (the unit cannot be
certified genuine). A gate that was not run is ``NOT_ASSESSED``, never PASS.

authenticity.description: Device authenticity via attestation. FAIL is disqualifying.

firmware_vbios.description: Firmware/VBIOS integrity (no re-flash). FAIL is disqualifying.

DeterministicGates.title: DeterministicGates

DutyBlock.description:
Cumulative use, the odometer (added in schema 1.1.0).

NVML exposes no lifetime-hours counter, so duty can only be ACCUMULATED
(registry deltas across scans, or continuous monitoring), never read in one
shot. Every field is optional: a quantity that has not been accumulated stays
None (rendered as Not Assessed) rather than being estimated from a single
point-in-time read. ``basis`` states how the values were accumulated so a
reader can weigh them.

basis.description: How duty was accumulated: 'registry_accumulated' (deltas across ledger scans) or 'monitor_continuous' (Gold monitoring). None = not accumulated.
basis.title: Basis

energy_kwh_total.description: Cumulative energy through the board, kWh.
energy_kwh_total.title: Energy Kwh Total

sustained_high_power_hours.description: Cumulative hours at sustained high power (>95% TDP).
sustained_high_power_hours.title: Sustained High Power Hours

thermal_cycles_total.description: Cumulative thermal cycles on the record.
thermal_cycles_total.title: Thermal Cycles Total

DutyBlock.title: DutyBlock

EccCounters.description: ECC error counters captured wide (volatile + aggregate, SRAM + DRAM).
EccCounters.title: EccCounters

EnvironmentBlock.description:
Facility-layer context from a data-center connector. Absent means exposure
renders as Not Assessed.

Exposure is never inferred from board power (board-side draw says nothing about
supply quality); it requires real facility instrumentation, which lands here
when a connector is present.

power_quality_instrumented.description: Whether facility power-quality instrumentation is present.
power_quality_instrumented.title: Power Quality Instrumented

EnvironmentBlock.title: EnvironmentBlock

FunctionalBlock.description: Functional-mode results (drained unit). Present only when functional mode ran.
FunctionalBlock.title: FunctionalBlock

GateResult.description:
Outcome of a deterministic gate or functional pass/fail.

``NOT_ASSESSED`` is a first-class value: a gate that was not run is never
silently treated as PASS, and consumers must render it as its own state
rather than folding it into either outcome.
GateResult.title: GateResult

History.description: Whether the unit's history was captured from first-seen or reconstructed.
History.title: History

IdentityBlock.description: The permanent identity of the unit and its authenticity evidence.

authenticity_confidence.description: Confidence in authenticity [0,1]. Lower for SECONDARY_FALLBACK parts.
authenticity_confidence.title: Authenticity Confidence

board_id.description: Board id / chassis-relative id, if available.
board_id.title: Board Id

ecc384_id.description: Device-unique ECC-384 identity (hex/base64 string). The permanent key.
ecc384_id.title: Ecc384 Id

identity_scheme.description: Whether identity is hardware-rooted or a fallback.

reflash_detected.description: True if VBIOS re-flash/tamper was detected.
reflash_detected.title: Reflash Detected

serial.description: Board/device serial as reported (string; may be long).
serial.title: Serial

IdentityBlock.title: IdentityBlock

IdentityScheme.description: How the device identity is anchored.
IdentityScheme.title: IdentityScheme

MeasuredBlock.description:
Certificate block 2: measured condition (facts vs thresholds, no weights, no model).

Wide and extensible. Everything a future modeled track could need is captured
here even though nothing modeled is computed from it yet; first scans cannot be
re-run, so under-capturing now would be an unrecoverable loss. ``extensions`` is
the additive landing zone for underwriter fields that are not yet first-class
(still typed JSON, no ``Any``).

duty.description: Cumulative use (the odometer), registry-accumulated. None until accumulation exists; not derived from a single read (added in schema 1.1.0).

extensions.description: Additive, forward-compatible capture (underwriter fields). JSON values only; integers stay within the safe-integer domain (large/opaque data belongs in raw_reads).
extensions.title: Extensions

MeasuredBlock.title: MeasuredBlock

NvLinkStatus.description: NVLink presence/health captured wide (hardware sub-index input).

total_links.description: Total NVLink links on the board.
total_links.title: Total Links

NvLinkStatus.title: NvLinkStatus

remapped.description: Remapped rows/pages (the wear signal toward the 512 cap).
remapped.title: Remapped

retired_dbe.description: Pages retired due to double-bit errors.
retired_dbe.title: Retired Dbe

retired_sbe.description: Pages retired due to single-bit errors.
retired_sbe.title: Retired Sbe

ProvenanceBlock.description:
Certificate block 4: provenance and coverage. ``exposure_assessed`` defaults to
False and is rendered prominently; it is only True with real facility
instrumentation.

chain_gaps.description: Whether there are gaps in the custody/telemetry chain.
chain_gaps.title: Chain Gaps

custody_pointer.description: Opaque pointer to custody records (no PII).
custody_pointer.title: Custody Pointer

exposure_assessed.description: True only with facility instrumentation. Never inferred from board power; rendered prominently.
exposure_assessed.title: Exposure Assessed

ProvenanceBlock.title: ProvenanceBlock

RawPayload.description:
A single verbatim source payload: the replay substrate.

Stored as an **opaque string** (raw text or base64) so it is byte-exact and so any
large numbers in raw telemetry are preserved without lossy JSON-number round-tripping.

content.description: Verbatim payload content as returned by the source.
content.title: Content

key.description: Logical name of this payload (e.g. the API/field it came from).
key.title: Key

RawPayload.title: RawPayload

RawReads.description: All verbatim source payloads. Future model versions re-process this; never discard.
RawReads.title: RawReads

RunMode.description: The mode the agent ran in to produce the bundle.
RunMode.title: RunMode

Signature.description:
ECDSA P-384 signature over the canonical (RFC 8785) bytes of the bundle.

Self-describing: it embeds the algorithm, canonicalization scheme, and the signer's
public key (SPKI DER, base64) so any party can check *cryptographic integrity*.
Binding the public key to an *authorized* signer (operator/Voltry) is a separate
platform-registry concern, not a property of this object.

public_key_spki_b64.description: Signer public key, SubjectPublicKeyInfo DER, base64.
public_key_spki_b64.title: Public Key Spki B64

Signature.title: Signature

SpareRows.description: HBM row-remap headroom: the Hopper end-of-life gauge (first passage to the 512 cap).

correctable_remaps.description: Remaps from correctable errors, if separable.
correctable_remaps.title: Correctable Remaps

failure_occurred.description: Whether a row-remap failure was reported.
failure_occurred.title: Failure Occurred

remaining.description: Spare rows remaining toward the fixed cap.
remaining.title: Remaining

uncorrectable_remaps.description: Remaps from uncorrectable errors, if separable.
uncorrectable_remaps.title: Uncorrectable Remaps

SpareRows.title: SpareRows

StabilitySignals.description: Throttle/clock/power stability flags (facts, not a score).
StabilitySignals.title: StabilitySignals

Thermals.description: Thermal snapshot (series captured in Monitor mode; wide for the thermal index).
Thermals.title: Thermals

Tier.description:
Provenance/coverage tier. Maps to run mode: READ is roughly Bronze, a full
functional pass Silver, continuous monitoring Gold.
Tier.title: Tier

XidEvent.description: A normalized Xid event (mapped to the one taxonomy before any pooling).

category.description: Normalized failure-taxonomy category for this Xid.
category.title: Category

count.description: Occurrences of this Xid in the captured window.
count.title: Count

critical.description: Whether this Xid is in the critical set.
critical.title: Critical

XidEvent.title: XidEvent

description:
The signed evidence bundle: source of truth, replay artifact, and ledger leaf.

The certificate is a *view* over this. It carries the measurement, the verbatim raw
reads (replay substrate), and the provenance/methodology stamps, but no modeled
estimate and no price.

agent.description: The probe build that produced the bundle.

calibration_snapshot_id.description: Calibration snapshot id for modeled fields. None while no modeled fields are computed.
calibration_snapshot_id.title: Calibration Snapshot Id

environment.description: Facility context from a data-center connector, if present.

methodology_version_hash.description: Hash of the methodology version this bundle was captured under, stamped so a third party can replay the exact method.
methodology_version_hash.title: Methodology Version Hash

schema_version.description: Semver of the schema this bundle conforms to.
schema_version.title: Schema Version

signature.description: ECDSA P-384 signature over canonical bytes. None until signed.

title: Voltry Evidence Bundle
